heading: Ensuring the integrity of voice communications
label: 262 Ensuring the integrity of voice communications

children.heading: Registration and compliance by intermediate providers
children.label: a Registration and compliance by intermediate providers

children.text: comply with the service quality standards for such transmission to be established by the Commission under subsection (c)(1)(B).

children.heading: Required use of registered intermediate providers
children.label: b Required use of registered intermediate providers
children.text: A covered provider may not use an intermediate provider to transmit covered voice communications unless such intermediate provider is registered under subsection (a)(1).

children.heading: Registry
children.label: A Registry
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Commission shall promulgate rules to establish a registry to record registrations under subsection (a)(1).February 26, 2018

children.heading: Service quality standards
children.label: B Service quality standards
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Commission shall promulgate rules to establish service quality standards for the transmission of covered voice communications by intermediate providers.February 26, 2018

children.label: A
children.text: ensure the integrity of the transmission of covered voice communications to all customers in the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: prevent unjust or unreasonable discrimination among areas of the United States in the delivery of covered voice communications.

children.heading: Public availability of registry
children.label: d Public availability of registry
children.text: The Commission shall make the registry established under subsection (c)(1)(A) publicly available on the website of the Commission.

children.heading: Scope of application
children.label: e Scope of application
children.text: The requirements of this section shall apply regardless of the format by which any communication or service is provided, the protocol or format by which the transmission of such communication or service is achieved, or the regulatory classification of such communication or service.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: f Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to affect the regulatory classification of any communication or service.

children.heading: Effect on other laws
children.label: g Effect on other laws
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to preempt or expand the authority of a State public utility commission or other relevant State agency to collect data, or investigate and enforce State law and regulations, regarding the completion of intrastate voice communications, regardless of the format by which any communication or service is provided, the protocol or format by which the transmission of such communication or service is achieved, or the regulatory classification of such communication or service.

on or before the date that is 1 year after , has certified as a Safe Harbor provider under section 64.2107(a) of title 47, Code of Federal Regulations, or any successor regulation; andFebruary 26, 2018
continues to meet the requirements under such section 64.2107(a).

children.heading: Covered provider
children.label: 1 Covered provider
children.text: The term “covered provider” has the meaning given the term in section 64.2101 of title 47, Code of Federal Regulations, or any successor thereto.

children.label: A
children.text: from the placement of a call from a connection using a North American Numbering Plan resource or a call placed to a connection using such a numbering resource; and

children.label: B
children.text: through any service provided by a covered provider.

children.label: i
children.text: from an end user connection using a North American Numbering Plan resource; or

children.label: ii
children.text: to an end user connection using such a numbering resource; and

children.label: B
children.text: does not itself, either directly or in conjunction with an affiliate, serve as a covered provider in the context of originating or terminating a given call.
